name: Scope CLI Build

on:
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - ".github/scripts/deploy-railway.sh"
      - ".github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml"
      - "api/src/app.rs"
      - "api/src/http/responses.rs"
      - "api/src/http/routes.rs"
      - "api/src/http/type_exports.rs"
      - "cli/**"
      - "crates/scope-core/**"
      - "rust-toolchain.toml"
      - "web/src/api/types.generated.ts"
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - ".github/scripts/deploy-railway.sh"
      - ".github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml"
      - "api/src/app.rs"
      - "api/src/http/responses.rs"
      - "api/src/http/routes.rs"
      - "api/src/http/type_exports.rs"
      - "cli/**"
      - "crates/scope-core/**"
      - "rust-toolchain.toml"
      - "web/src/api/types.generated.ts"
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true

jobs:
  checks:
    name: Check scope-cli
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v7

      - name: Install Rust
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
        with:
          toolchain: 1.94.0
          components: rustfmt, clippy

      - name: Cache Rust build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v6
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/git
            ~/.cargo/registry
            cli/target
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cli-cargo-${{ hashFiles('cli/Cargo.lock') }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-cli-cargo-${{ hashFiles('cli/Cargo.lock') }}
            ${{ runner.os }}-cli-cargo-

      - name: Check formatting
        run: cargo fmt --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml -- --check

      - name: Test
        run: cargo test --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml --locked

      - name: Lint
        run: cargo clippy --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml --all-targets --locked -- -D warnings

      - name: Build release binaries
        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        run: >
          cargo build
          --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml
          --release
          --locked
          --bin scope
          --bin scope-cli-service

  build:
    name: Build ${{ matrix.label }}
    needs: checks
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.runner }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - label: Linux x64
            runner: ubuntu-latest
            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
            artifact: scope-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
            binary: target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/scope
            builder: cargo
            smoke: true
          - label: Linux ARM64
            runner: ubuntu-latest
            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
            artifact: scope-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
            binary: target/aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/scope
            builder: cross
            smoke: false
          - label: macOS Intel
            runner: macos-15-intel
            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
            artifact: scope-x86_64-apple-darwin
            binary: target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/scope
            builder: cargo
            smoke: true
          - label: macOS Apple Silicon
            runner: macos-15
            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
            artifact: scope-aarch64-apple-darwin
            binary: target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/scope
            builder: cargo
            smoke: true
          - label: Windows x64
            runner: windows-latest
            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
            artifact: scope-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
            binary: target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/scope.exe
            builder: cargo
            smoke: true
          - label: Windows ARM64
            runner: windows-latest
            target: aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
            artifact: scope-aarch64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
            binary: target/aarch64-pc-windows-msvc/release/scope.exe
            builder: cargo
            smoke: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v7

      - name: Install Rust
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
        with:
          toolchain: 1.94.0
          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}

      - name: Cache Rust build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v6
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/git
            ~/.cargo/registry
            cli/target
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('cli/Cargo.lock') }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('cli/Cargo.lock') }}
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-

      - name: Install cross
        if: matrix.builder == 'cross'
        working-directory: cli
        env:
          CARGO_TARGET_DIR: target/cargo-install
        run: cargo install cross --locked

      - name: Build scope
        working-directory: cli
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ "${{ matrix.builder }}" = "cross" ]; then
            cross build --release --locked --target "${{ matrix.target }}" --bin scope
          else
            cargo build --release --locked --target "${{ matrix.target }}" --bin scope
          fi

      - name: Smoke test
        if: matrix.smoke
        working-directory: cli
        shell: bash
        run: ./${{ matrix.binary }} --help

      - name: Stage artifact
        working-directory: cli
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          cp "${{ matrix.binary }}" "dist/${{ matrix.artifact }}"

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: ${{ matrix.artifact }}
          path: cli/dist/${{ matrix.artifact }}
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy:
    name: Deploy scope-cli
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v7

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
        with:
          path: cli/dist
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Verify artifacts and write checksums
        shell: bash
        run: |
          expected=(
            scope-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
            scope-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
            scope-x86_64-apple-darwin
            scope-aarch64-apple-darwin
            scope-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
            scope-aarch64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
          )

          for artifact in "${expected[@]}"; do
            test -s "cli/dist/$artifact"
          done

          (
            cd cli/dist
            for artifact in "${expected[@]}"; do
              sha256sum "$artifact" > "$artifact.sha256"
            done
          )

      - name: Install Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: 24

      - name: Stage Railway upload root
        shell: bash
        run: |
          rm -rf .railway-upload
          mkdir -p .railway-upload
          cp -a cli/. .railway-upload/
          cp rust-toolchain.toml .railway-upload/rust-toolchain.toml
          mkdir -p .railway-upload/crates
          cp -a crates/scope-core .railway-upload/crates/scope-core
          perl -0pi -e 's#path = "\.\./crates/scope-core"#path = "crates/scope-core"#' .railway-upload/Cargo.toml
          grep -F 'path = "crates/scope-core"' .railway-upload/Cargo.toml
          test -s .railway-upload/railpack.json
          test -s .railway-upload/crates/scope-core/Cargo.toml

      - name: Install Railway CLI
        run: npm install -g @railway/cli@5.23.1

      - name: Deploy artifacts to Railway
        shell: bash
use serde::Deserialize;
use std::sync::OnceLock;

const TARGET_MANIFEST_JSON: &str = include_str!("../distribution/targets.json");

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct RawManifest {
    schema_version: u16,
    targets: Vec<DistributionTarget>,
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug, Deserialize)]
pub struct DistributionTarget {
    pub triple: String,
    pub artifact: String,
    pub os: String,
    pub arch: String,
    pub label: String,
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
pub struct DistributionManifest {
    targets: Vec<DistributionTarget>,
}

impl DistributionManifest {
    pub fn bundled() -> &'static Self {
        static MANIFEST: OnceLock<DistributionManifest> = OnceLock::new();
        MANIFEST.get_or_init(|| {
            Self::from_json(TARGET_MANIFEST_JSON).expect("bundled distribution manifest is valid")
        })
    }

    pub fn from_json(json: &str) -> Result<Self, serde_json::Error> {
        let raw: RawManifest = serde_json::from_str(json)?;
        assert_eq!(raw.schema_version, 1, "unsupported distribution manifest");
        Ok(Self {
            targets: raw.targets,
        })
    }

    pub fn targets(&self) -> &[DistributionTarget] {
        &self.targets
    }

    pub fn downloadable_file(&self, requested: &str) -> Option<String> {
        self.targets.iter().find_map(|target| {
            if requested == target.artifact {
                Some(target.artifact.clone())
            } else if requested == target.checksum_artifact() {
                Some(requested.to_string())
            } else {
                None
            }
        })
    }

    pub fn required_downloads(&self) -> impl Iterator<Item = String> + '_ {
        self.targets.iter().flat_map(|target| {
            [
                target.artifact.clone(),
                target.checksum_artifact().to_string(),
            ]
        })
    }
}

impl DistributionTarget {
    pub fn checksum_artifact(&self) -> String {
        format!("{}.sha256", self.artifact)
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::DistributionManifest;

    #[test]
    fn bundled_manifest_contains_supported_targets() {
        let manifest = DistributionManifest::bundled();
        let targets: Vec<_> = manifest
            .targets()
            .iter()
            .map(|target| target.triple.as_str())
            .collect();

        assert_eq!(
            targets,
            vec![
                "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu",
                "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu",
                "x86_64-apple-darwin",
                "aarch64-apple-darwin",
                "x86_64-pc-windows-msvc",
                "aarch64-pc-windows-msvc",
            ]
        );
    }

    #[test]
    fn downloadable_files_are_manifest_artifacts_and_checksums_only() {
        let manifest = DistributionManifest::bundled();

        assert!(
            manifest
                .downloadable_file("scope-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu")
                .is_some()
        );
        assert!(
            manifest
                .downloadable_file("scope-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.sha256")
                .is_some()
        );
        assert!(manifest.downloadable_file("../scope").is_none());
        assert!(manifest.downloadable_file("scope").is_none());
    }
}

   253	    context: &RequestContext,

   260	        &context.target.owner,
   261	        &context.target.repo,
   262	        &request.id,

   267	            .with_context(|| format!("create {}", parent.to_string_lossy()))?;
   268	    }
   269	    fs::write(&bundle_path, bytes)
   270	        .with_context(|| format!("write {}", bundle_path.to_string_lossy()))?;
   271	    let remote_ref = request_remote_ref(&context.target.remote, &request.id);
   272	    let fetch_result = run_git_in_repo(
   273	        git_repo,

   278	        ],
   279	    );
   280	    let _ = fs::remove_file(&bundle_path);
   281	    fetch_result
   282	}
